name: Diner Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine all ingredients except for the tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese in a large bowl.
3. Mix the ingredients lightly until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a 10 x 6-inch loaf pan, shaping it into a loaf.
5. Bake for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
6. After baking, drain any excess fat from the meatloaf.
7. During the last half hour of baking, pour the tomato sauce over the meatloaf.
8. Place the mozzarella cheese slices on top of the meatloaf.
9. Bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
10. Serve 4 to 6 portions.
